summary.rationale: The songs page matches the updated list-detail workspace direction and now uses more restrained radius, fewer nested cards, clearer typography contrast, and a more intentional empty detail state that better fit the selected aesthetic profile.

findings.message: If song data moves to an async source, loading and error states will need to be added explicitly to preserve the operator state-coverage pattern.
findings.recommendation: Add loading and recoverable error messaging when the songs dataset is no longer synchronous local data.
evidence: Current implementation reads from src/lib/songs.ts synchronously.
The detail pane and list pane already declare empty and selected states.

notes: Single dominant action in the list region is preserved.
Empty states are present where relevant for the synchronous MVP.
The list remains visible while the detail pane is active.
Metadata and section content are grouped for fast scanning.
Warm muted surfaces and restrained borders fit the selected profile.
The header no longer overpowers the operational content area.
Large rounded corners and pill styling were reduced to avoid a softer SaaS feel.
Divider-led grouping keeps the surface calmer than the earlier card-stack treatment.
The empty state now reads as part of the editorial workspace instead of an accidental blank panel.
The page avoids cool techno chrome and hyper-saturated emphasis.
The composition keeps editorial calm without drifting into false airiness.
Radius and badge treatments now better align with the engine's restrained material guidance.
Typography and separators now carry more of the hierarchy, which improves fit with the quieter reference family.
Browser capture confirmed that the top framing and empty pane feel more deliberate after refinement.

next_steps: Capture rendered screenshots in a future supervisor upgrade to support visual review with evidence.
Add explicit loading and error states if songs become remote or user-generated.
